experience.shortDescription: Responsible for maintaining cheque records, processing cash and cheque deposits, and preparing monthly sales and financial reports.
experience.fullDescription:
1. Maintain accurate cheque registers and related records.
2. Process and arrange cash and cheque deposits.
3. Prepare monthly sales and accounting reports.

experience.shortDescription: Responsible for handling customers, managing printing operations, planning and measuring name board installations, and overseeing income, expenses, and material orders.
experience.fullDescription:
1. Handling customers.
2. Managing printing workloads.
3. Name board planning & taking measurements from customer's places.
4. Managing income & expenses, Material ordering.

experience.shortDescription: Responsible for designing footwear, creating accurate shoe patterns, and preparing production-ready designs.
experience.fullDescription:
- Designing new designs of Men's & ladies' shoes & sandals.
- Making patterns for per-designed shoes.
- Merchandising All kinds of leathers & shoe accessories.
- Handling new developments of out soles & leathers.

experience.shortDescription: Responsible for managing store inventory, coordinating material supplies, and supporting production operations to ensure timely workflow.
experience.fullDescription:
- Handling All Supply sections as Cutting, Embroider & Assembling.
- Planning shifts for the employees.
- Coordinating material purchases with head office.
- Arranging foreign Purchases with head office purchasing team.

experience.shortDescription: Responsible for managing IT systems, maintaining servers and networks, ensuring system security, and providing technical support for smooth business operations.
experience.fullDescription:
ERP & Payroll System
- Install, configure, update, and troubleshoot ERP and payroll systems.
- Manage user accounts and permissions.
- Ensure regular backups and implement security measures.

Biostar Fingerprint System
- Install, configure, and maintain the fingerprint system.
- Manage user enrollment and data security.
- Regularly calibrate devices and troubleshoot issues.

TallyPrime Accounting System
- Set up, configure, and update TallyPrime.
- Support users, ensure data integrity, and implement security protocols.

Physical Windows Servers
- Install, configure, and maintain Windows servers.
- Monitor performance, manage backups, and enforce security policies.
- Active Directory Users Management & Group Policy Management.

OpenMedia Backup Server
- Configure and manage the backup server.
- Schedule regular backups and ensure data recovery.
- Monitor performance and manage storage.

Hosted WiFi Spots (Factory & Office)
- Set up and manage WiFi access points.
- Ensure network security, monitor performance, and manage user access.

Company Network & Access Management
- Design and implement network infrastructure.
- Manage access controls, monitor network performance, and enforce security measures.

General Duties
- Respond to system and network incidents.
- Develop IT policies and provide training to staff.
- Liaise with vendors and stay updated with technology trends.
- PP Bag designing for printing

about.bioContent: I am a seasoned professional at the nexus of cybersecurity and IT, dedicated to safeguarding and optimizing private company IT infrastructures. With a wealth of knowledge and educational background in both cybersecurity and IT, I am passionate about driving technological resilience and innovation to support organizational success.
about.headline: IT Executive
about.heroDescription: , My Desire is to make better secure environment to all.

education.description: Human Resource Management and Organizational Behavior, focusing on how people and organizations interact. It covers key areas such as HRM activities, external organizational conditions, managing workforce diversity, employee behavior, recruitment and selection processes, training and development, compensation systems, employee separation, and the use of human resource information systems. The course helps learners develop skills to effectively manage employees and improve organizational performance.

This certification provides skills in identifying, analyzing, and preventing cybersecurity threats using ethical hacking techniques. It focuses on network security, vulnerability assessment, and defensive strategies to protect systems from cyber attacks.

education.institution: (ISC)2 - Inspiring a safe and secure cyber world

education.description: I/ML Engineer – Stage 1 provides the fundamental building blocks to create a professional Artificial Intelligence Engineer. This journey begins with the understanding of the theoretical underpinnings of Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Machine Learning(ML), which will provide the learner with an understanding of how each area of expertise is used in the industry

The widespread adoption of AI necessitates methodical guardrails to govern, manage, and secure its use. With such guardrails, you can enable the fast yet safe integration of AI into your organization. This certification covers core concepts in generative AI, global AI laws, compliance obligations, AI risk management, and AI governance frameworks that ensure responsible innovation. Authored by industry-leading experts with decades of experience in data privacy, security, and governance, the AI Security & Governance Certification prepares you for the future.
